spoilers.title: [#ONEPIECE] -Something definitely up with this, a while back in chapter 692 for the cover page we had got strawhats in front big time clock. -In this new post about the treasure being 651 meters down
spoilers.text: [#ONEPIECE] -Something definitely up with this, a while back in chapter 692 for the cover page we had got strawhats in front big time clock. -In this new post about the treasure being 651 meters down ocean floor. 6 in Japanese associated Mu/Void & nothingness!! Imu connection 🤔 -Then 5 associated with Go, we know Luffy fruit and his attack names starts with Go and Mu! We got I, that could represent who will be the winner, will Luffy find the one piece & accomplish him dream or will imu be the winner & create his new world Pew (@pewpiece) Oda has placed the secret of the ONE PIECE treasure and Monkey D. Luffy in the ocean at a sea floor depth of 651 m. — https://nitter.net/pewpiece/status/2028856239606636567#m

misc.title: Time to find that treasure... Do you guys join me? We need to buy a big ship first... @pewpiece @sigmarshanks @ohimetenshi @3SkullJoe @Mugiwara_23 @AniKing @moland48666 @writingpanini @MbokaKN @merlin
misc.text: Time to find that treasure... Do you guys join me? We need to buy a big ship first... @pewpiece @sigmarshanks @ohimetenshi @3SkullJoe @Mugiwara_23 @AniKing @moland48666 @writingpanini @MbokaKN @merlinidc @tea_with_hunny @KHDLuffy @OgHumanTripod Pew (@pewpiece) BREAKING 🚨🚨🚨🚨: Eiichiro Oda has written the secret of the ONEPIECE treasure and Monkey D. Luffy on a piece of paper and hid it at the bottom of the ocean. The truth will be revealed once the series ends. — https://nitter.net/pewpiece/status/2028850357707681955#m
